title: CompassGUI
description: Compass Tracker | Player Tracker | Mob Tracker | GUI | Manhunt
body:
**Features:**
- Player Tracking
- Mob Tracking
- Permissions
- Useful compass configuration
- GUI

**Installation:**
1. Download the latest version of the plugin
2. Put it into your plugin folder
3. Use permissions plugin or permissions.yml to give permissions to players to use compass tracker.
4. Restart your server.

**Permissions**:
- compassgui.*
- compassgui.command.*
- compassgui.command.track.*
- compassgui.command.help
- compassgui.command.version
- compassgui.command.track.mob
- compassgui.command.track.player
- compassgui.command.tracker

**Allows the player to use player tracker GUI.**
- compassgui.playertracking

**Allows the player to use mob tracker GUI (excludes player).**
- compassgui.mobtracking

**Configurations:**
Modify how you want the players to use compass and messages
in config.yml and messages.yml

**Support/Report Bug:**
https://discord.gg/2KwaUXz2AG
